creator: canardo909@gmx.com
text:
Problem found when building multimedia/vlc3 on FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p1 powerpc 32 bit, running on Apple Powerbook 17". 

# /usr/ports/multimedia/vlc3 
# make install clean
vlc3-3.0.4,4: Makefile error: category ipv6 not in list of valid categories.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/multimedia/vlc3
